inputs.titre: Saint Louis promulgue la Grande ordonnance, visant à réformer l'administration du royaume de France

reason: The image depicts a scene that is plausibly Saint Louis promulgating the Grande Ordonnance. The architecture (timber frame roof, leaded glass windows), clothing, candles, and documents are generally consistent with the period. There are no obvious anachronisms. The cast iron candle holders seem slightly more modern, though wrought iron would be a better fit. The quality of the image is high which makes it look almost too perfect.
